mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INQUIRY (user_id, category, title, content, file) VALUES ( (SELECT id FROM USER WHERE email = #{userEmail}), #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{file} )
mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.user_id, i.category, i.title, i.content, i.file, i.result, i.status, i.reg_date, i.process_date, u.email, u.name FROM INQUIRY i INNER JOIN USER u ON i.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = #{email} ORDER BY i.id DESC

SELECT i.id, i.user_id, i.category, i.title, i.content, i.file, i.result, i.status, i.reg_date, i.process_date, u.email, u.name FROM INQUIRY i INNER JOIN USER u ON i.user_id = u.id WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY i.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE INQUIRY SET status = #{status}, result = #{result}, process_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
